responsibilities: Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines that automate model training, validation, and deployment to production
Build and manage scalable ML infrastructure on Kubernetes to support training and real-time inference workloads
Implement model monitoring systems that detect data drift, performance degradation, and prediction anomalies
Develop infrastructure-as-code templates using Terraform to provision reproducible ML training environments
Manage feature stores and model registries to ensure consistency and governance across ML teams
Optimize GPU and compute resource allocation to reduce training and inference costs across the ML platform
Collaborate with data scientists and ML engineers to streamline the path from experimentation to production
Establish versioning and rollback strategies for models, datasets, and training pipelines to ensure reliability
Build observability dashboards using Prometheus and Grafana to track model and infrastructure health metrics
Troubleshoot production ML system incidents, conducting root cause analysis and implementing preventive measures
